title: Sufficiency Resilience
description: Detects when individuals or communities resist deficit narratives, affirming sufficiency and resilience through strength, craft, and autonomy instead of consumer dependence.
indicators: Ads and deficit projections actively resisted or blocked
Life patterns organized around durability, repair, and resilience
Identity grounded in sufficiency, not perpetual lack
Community memory affirming abundance and capability

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
